info.description: Bakkt Stablecoin API for crypto-fiat conversions. Get wallet addresses, manage destination bank accounts, and track conversion transactions.
info.title: Stablecoin API

post.description:
Setup a destination account where exchanged crypto will be sent to in fiat. KYC is required.

**Important:** When providing third party beneficiary details (`third_party_details`), the `beneficiary_first_name` and `beneficiary_last_name` fields must contain at least one letter. Names containing only digits are not accepted.

account_name.description: Alias for User Remote Bank Account

main_beneficiary.description: Setting this as true will set the account as the default off ramp bank account for a given user

account_details.description: Select account type based on currency: EUR (IBAN), GBP (Account+Sort), USD (Account+Routing), PKR/INR (with customer details), TRY (IBAN), NGN (Account+Bank code), MXN/PHP/IDR (full remittance details), BRL (PIX key), ARS (Account+Tax ID), KES (Phone+Provider), CNY (Phone only)

currency.description: Requires a valid ISO-4217 currency code
Requires a valid ISO-4217 currency code
Requires a valid ISO-4217 currency code

bank_code.description: The code of the bank in american banking system (ABA)

currency.description: Requires a valid ISO-4217 currency code

account_number.description: The bank account number. **Sandbox Testing for PKR:** Use 12345678911112.

bank_code.description: The bank's code... **Sandbox Testing for PKR:** Use EASYPAISA.

account_type.description: The account type (BA: Bank Account, DW: Digital Wallet). **Sandbox Testing for PKR:** Use BA.

currency.description: Requires a valid ISO-4217 currency code
Requires a valid ISO-4217 currency code
The currency of the bank account

bank_name.description: The name of the beneficiary's bank

beneficiary_bank_address.description: The address of the beneficiary's bank

recipient_relationship.description: The relationship that recipient has with sender

pix_key.description: PIX key for Brazilian payments. Can be an email address, phone number, CPF, or bank account number. CNPJ is not accepted.

recipient_relationship.description: The relationship that recipient has with sender
The relationship that recipient has with sender

bank_name.description: The name of the beneficiary's bank

beneficiary_bank_address.description: The address of the beneficiary's bank

recipient_relationship.description: The relationship that recipient has with sender
The relationship that recipient has with sender

mobile_provider.description: The mobile provider associated with the beneficiary's phone number

recipient_relationship.description: The relationship that recipient has with sender

bank_name.description: The name of the beneficiary's bank

beneficiary_bank_address.description: The address of the beneficiary's bank

recipient_relationship.description: The relationship that recipient has with sender

post.summary: [CORPORATE] Create a single-use offramp wallet for a corporate
post.description: Creates a single-use wallet address linked to a specific external reference for a corporate. This wallet is used to receive stablecoins, which will automatically trigger an offramp process to the corporate's main beneficiary bank account. This endpoint is restricted to whitelisted corporate users.

external_reference.description: External reference to link the single-use wallet

message.example: Request body is malformed, please review the documentation: https://api.bakkt.com
Invalid session_id or api key

403.description: Forbidden (e.g., corporate not whitelisted for this feature)

404.description: Resource not found (e.g., corporate UUID not found)

patch.description: Updates merchant fees. Allows to optionally filter to specific ones with fee configuration parameters

fee.description: The fee value in decimals (e.g.: 0.01 corresponds to 1%)

input_currency.description: If direction is offramp, the input currency represents tokens based on it. For instance USD would represent usdt, usdc, so on

output_currency.description: If direction is onramp, the output currency represents tokens based on it. For instance USD would represent usdt, usdc, so on

minimum_fee.description: A FIXED value to apply as a minimum merchant fee. Eg: If input_currency is EUR and minimum_fee is 2, the minimum merchant fee to be applied is 2 EUR to every transaction

get.description: Generates a URL to access a receipt for a completed transaction. This endpoint allows merchants to retrieve transaction receipt URLs for their users or corporate entities. Either user_uuid OR corporate_uuid must be provided, but not both.

parameters.name: process_uuid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the transaction process for which to generate a receipt

parameters.name: user_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the individual user associated with the transaction. Required if corporate_uuid is not provided. Cannot be used with corporate_uuid.

parameters.name: corporate_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the corporate entity associated with the transaction. Required if user_uuid is not provided. Cannot be used with user_uuid.

receipt_url.description: URL to access the transaction receipt

expires_at.description: Expiration date for the receipt URL

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input or validation error

message.example: Either user_uuid or corporate_uuid must be provided
Only one of user_uuid OR corporate_uuid can be present, not both

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid merchant authentication

message.example: Merchant UUID is required from authorizer

404.description: Not Found - User or company not found or doesn't belong to merchant

message.example: User not found
Company not found
An Unknown error has happened, please reach out to the dev support of Bakkt.
